message: The infer command reached CPU enhancement, but torch multiprocessing failed under the sandbox permission model even after the output path issue was fixed.

evidence.root_cause: deepFilter uses a DataLoader with multiprocessing resource sharing; the unprivileged sandbox blocked the socket/listener setup needed by torch.multiprocessing.

mitigation_options: Rerun the same infer command outside the sandbox to validate whether the failure is permission-related rather than model-related.
If sandbox execution remains required in the future, replace the CLI path with a single-process callable path or patch worker settings with a recorded change.

history.message: Initial environment from deepfilternet==0.5.6 omitted torch even though the CLI imports it at startup.
The repo-native infer command assumed an existing parent directory for artifacts/df_out.
